mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( reporter_id, room_id, target_member_id, report_type, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{reporterId}, NULL, #{targetMemberId}, 'MEMBER', #{reason}, 'PENDING' )
INSERT INTO report ( reporter_id, room_id, target_member_id, report_type, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{reporterId}, #{roomId}, #{targetMemberId}, 'ROOM', #{reason}, 'PENDING' )

INSERT INTO report ( reporter_id, room_id, chat_room_id, target_member_id, report_type, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{reporterId}, #{roomId}, #{chatRoomId}, #{targetMemberId}, 'CHAT', #{reason}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.room_id AS roomId, r.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, r.target_member_id AS targetMemberId, target.email AS targetMemberEmail, target.name AS targetMemberName, r.reporter_id AS reporterId, reporter.email AS reporterEmail, reporter.name AS reporterName, r.report_type AS reportType, r.reason AS reason, r.status AS status, r.resolution_type AS resolutionType, r.resolution_message AS resolutionMessage, r.processed_by AS processedBy, processor.email AS processedByEmail, processor.name AS processedByName, r.processed_at AS processedAt, r.report_created_at AS reportCreatedAt FROM report r INNER JOIN members target ON target.member_id = r.target_member_id INNER JOIN members reporter ON reporter.member_id = r.reporter_id LEFT JOIN members processor ON processor.member_id = r.processed_by WHERE r.report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET status = #{status}, resolution_type = #{resolutionType}, resolution_message = #{resolutionMessage}, processed_by = #{processedBy}, processed_at = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{reportId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.target_member_id AS targetMemberId, target.email AS targetMemberEmail, target.name AS targetMemberName, r.room_id AS roomId, r.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, r.report_type AS reportType, r.reason AS reason, r.status AS status, r.resolution_type AS resolutionType, r.resolution_message AS resolutionMessage, r.processed_at AS processedAt, r.report_created_at AS reportCreatedAt FROM report r INNER JOIN members target ON target.member_id = r.target_member_id WHERE r.reporter_id = #{reporterId} AND r.report_id = #{reportId}

SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.target_member_id AS targetMemberId, target.email AS targetMemberEmail, target.name AS targetMemberName, r.room_id AS roomId, r.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, r.report_type AS reportType, r.reason AS reason, r.status AS status, r.resolution_type AS resolutionType, r.resolution_message AS resolutionMessage, r.processed_at AS processedAt, r.report_created_at AS reportCreatedAt FROM report r INNER JOIN members target ON target.member_id = r.target_member_id WHERE r.reporter_id = #{reporterId} ORDER BY r.report_created_at DESC, r.report_id DESC
